title: Find My Device - Play/Stop - multiple tries and exits
scenario: Repeatedly pressing Play/Stop on Find My Device tone causes app to exit or behave incorrectly
steps: Open the Find My Device feature in the app.
Press the Play button to start the tone.
Press the Stop button to stop the tone.
Repeat steps 2 and 3 multiple times in succession.
expected: The app should remain open and function correctly after each Play/Stop action. The sound should start and stop as expected each time.
